faqs.question: Why are carpenter ants so common in Oceanside homes?
faqs.answer: Oceanside's proximity to the Atlantic Ocean creates high humidity levels that attract carpenter ants to damp wood. Many homes in the area feature older wooden construction, decks, and landscaping timbers that provide ideal nesting sites. Our treatments address both the infestation and moisture issues to prevent recurrence.
